rulings.Case Title: CLAUDIA BLANCO et al VS. AMERICAN MORTGAGE EXPRESS CORP., AN ENTITY OF et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Monday, June 6, 2011, line 9, DEFENDANT CENTRAL MORTGAGE COMPANY'S DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 2ND CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 8TH CAUSE OF ACTION IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. DEFENDANT'S DEMURRER TO THE 1ST, 3RD, 4TH-7TH CAUSES OF ACTION ARE OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF MUST FILE ITS SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT WITHIN 10 DAYS OF NOTICE OF ENTRY OF THIS ORDER. =(302/LMG)
